title: Code Assistant Project Scope
concept: Defining the goal: fine-tuning a small base LLM to write simple Python functions.

exercises.prompt: What do you think is the main goal of a code assistant?

options.text: To help write simple Python functions

exercises.explain: The main goal of a code assistant is to simplify programming tasks, like writing simple Python functions.

cards.title: Project Goal
cards.body: The main goal of our project is to fine-tune a small language model to assist in writing simple Python functions.

cards.title: Fine-Tuning
cards.body: Fine-tuning is the process of adjusting a pre-trained model to better perform on a specific task, like coding.

cards.title: Like Painting
cards.body: Think of fine-tuning as adding details to a painting. You start with a basic image and refine it to make it better.

cards.title: Python Functions
cards.body: A simple Python function might look like this: `def add(a, b): return a + b`. This is what our model will help create!

cards.title: Myth: Code Assistants Write Perfect Code
cards.body: It's important to know that code assistants won’t always write perfect code. They'll provide suggestions that you need to review.

cards.title: Project Scope vs Achievements
cards.body: Our project has clear goals, which we can visually compare to what our model achieves:

left.text: Fine-tune model to write Python functions

exercises.prompt: What is the primary purpose of fine-tuning the model in our project?

options.text: To help generate simple Python functions

exercises.explain: The correct answer is that we are focusing on helping generate simple Python functions with our model.

exercises.prompt: Fine-tuning helps the model create complex software architectures.
exercises.explain: This statement is false because fine-tuning in our project is aimed at creating simple Python functions, not complex architectures.

exercises.prompt: The goal of our Code Assistant project is to fine-tune a model to write ______ functions.
exercises.sentence: The goal of our Code Assistant project is to fine-tune a model to write simple functions.
exercises.explain: The correct word is 'simple' as we aim to help generate simple Python functions.

exercises.prompt: Which statement defines the goal of our project?

options.text: To create an AI that writes novels.
To create a model that assists in everyday tasks.
To fine-tune a model for writing simple Python functions.

exercises.explain: The correct statement defines our focused goal of fine-tuning a model specifically for writing simple Python functions.

exercises.prompt: What should our fine-tuned model primarily help with in the project?
exercises.explain: The primary focus of our fine-tuned model will be to help with writing simple Python functions, making programming easier for users.
